[codex] Add audio-reactive fractal presets

This pull request adds audio-reactive controls for the fractal visualizer and preserves the existing render settings.

The implementation keeps the animation loop focused while exposing a small set of controls for brightness, sensitivity, and palette changes.

We don't support that file type.

Try again with a GIF, JPEG, JPG, MOV, MP4, PNG, SVG, or WEBM.

Attach files by dragging & dropping, selecting or pasting them.
